name: humanitarian-mcp
description: Refugee and humanitarian open data (UNHCR, World Bank, HDX) as semantic MCP tools — profiles, per-capita comparisons, trends, charts, exports.
long_description: Gives Claude clean, semantic access to trusted humanitarian datasets: 75 years of UNHCR displacement statistics, World Bank denominators for per-capita views, and HDX crisis data (conflict, food security, funding) — normalized country codes (English and Arabic), provenance on every payload, charts, maps and reproducible CSV/JSON exports with manifests and codebooks. Read-only and rate-limited by design.

providers.title: Data providers
providers.description: Comma-separated provider ids to enable (see README).

cache.title: Cache backend
cache.description: "memory" (default) or "sqlite" for a persistent cache that enables offline use.
